title: Inspector Maigret
writer: Georges Simenon, Jean Delannoy, Rodolphe-Maurice Arlaud
actors: Jean Gabin, Annie Girardot, Olivier Hussenot
plot: In the Marais district in central Paris, somebody is going round murdering young women. Maigret is called to investigate.
awards: Nominated for 3 BAFTA 1 win & 3 nominations total
